<!-- indicator: fig-adults-insured -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-adults-insured
#| fig-cap: 'Percentage of Adults with Health Insurance, 2020–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization of Percentage of Adults with Health Insurance, 2020–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-adults-insured", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("fig-adults-insured", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
